name: Steam Games
description: Indexes installed Steam games in the background and launches them from the Asyar search via steam://run.
author: dose.dev

preferences.name: steamPath
preferences.title: Steam install folder
preferences.description: Override the Steam root folder if it is not at the default location (e.g. C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam). Leave blank to auto-detect.

preferences.name: hideTools
preferences.title: Hide Steam tools & redistributables
preferences.description: Skip non-game entries such as Steamworks Common Redistributables, Proton, and Steam Linux Runtime.

preferences.name: notifyOnReindex
preferences.title: Notify after a background reindex
preferences.description: Show a notification when the scheduled background reindex finds a change. Manual reindexes always notify.

commands.name: Reindex Steam Games
commands.description: Rescan Steam libraries now and refresh the launchable game list.
